name: USS PGM-21 (PGM-21)
events: 8 Apr 1945 USS Billfish (Lt.Cdr. L.C. Farley, USNR) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Staff (Lt. W.A. Upton, USNR), USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN), USS PGM-21 (Lt. L. Gardiner, USNR) and USS Torsk (Cdr. B.E. Lewellen, USN).

15 Apr 1945 USS Bumper (Cdr. J.W. Williams, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR), USS Seagull (Lt. W.S. Hall, USN), USS PGM-21 (Lt. L. Gardiner, USNR), USS Jack (Lt.Cdr. A.S. Fuhrman, USN) and USS Ray (Cdr. W.T. Kinsella, USN).
17 Apr 1945 USS Bumper (Cdr. J.W. Williams, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR) and USS PGM-21 (Lt. L. Gardiner, USNR).

22 Apr 1945 USS Capitaine (Lt.Cdr. E.S. Friedrick, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR), USS PGM-21 (Lt. L. Gardiner, USNR), USS Muskalunge (Lt.Cdr. L.A. Lajaunie, Jr., USN) and USS Segundo (Cdr. James D. Fulp, Jr., USN).

23 Apr 1945 USS Capitaine (Lt.Cdr. E.S. Friedrick, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR), USS PGM-21 (Lt. L. Gardiner, USNR), USS Muskalunge (Lt.Cdr. L.A. Lajaunie, Jr., USN) and USS Segundo (Cdr. James D. Fulp, Jr., USN).
